sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21666" key="gastrobarh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γαστρο-βᾰρής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n21666.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">heavy with child,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.53</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diosc.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
